seoTitle: Butterwick vs Byabarra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Butterwick and Byabarra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Butterwick and Byabarra.
heading: Butterwick vs Byabarra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Butterwick, New South Wales and Byabarra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Byabarra has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to Butterwick (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Butterwick or Byabarra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Butterwick has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Byabarra scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Butterwick scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Byabarra scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Butterwick or Byabarra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Byabarra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
